Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}This is the illustration collection I wanted, remember?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I bought all three. I blew my whole allowance, but it was definitely worth it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}...This book is by the same artist. If you're interested, you can borrow it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Just promise to think of me when you read it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I've read it so many times that I've practically got it memorized.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That's okay. But, will you hold onto it for me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I'll be happy just knowing that you're keeping something important of mine, {f 4 1}-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting dark out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}She said she has to stay late at work...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}And I-I've heard that there've been assaults on women in this area recently...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}C-Come on! I was just using that story as an excuse...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Or to be more specific, I don't want you to go back to your dorm...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}There are so many attractive girls there, like the student council president...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I know you have to go back eventually, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Could we be here, together, for just a little longer?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 22 0 109 28 25 20}I want you to stay. I just need to know... that you only have eyes for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro has expressed her love for me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Justice Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Melchizedek{f 0 1 27}, the hand of justice![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}It feels so warm being near you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent a long time with Chihiro.[n]{f 1 1}
